mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.datatablename FROM device d LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE d.id_site = #{id} AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.is_excluded_meter = 0
#{id}
AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', #{timezone_value}) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,2,4)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,3,4,7,5)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,5,7)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1,6,7)
AND d.show_on_domain IN(1)

UNION ALL
UNION ALL
UNION ALL
UNION ALL
UNION ALL
UNION ALL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'life_time' AS categories_time, IFNULL(SUM(`value`), 0) AS `value` FROM (
SELECT ma.${reading_field} - mi.${reading_field} AS `value` FROM ( SELECT dv.${reading_field}, dv.time FROM ${item.datatablename} dv WHERE dv.time = ( SELECT MIN(dv.time) AS time FROM ${item.datatablename} dv
dv.time >= CONVERT_TZ(#{commissioning}, #{timezone_value}, 'UTC')
) ) mi CROSS JOIN ( SELECT dv.${reading_field}, dv.time FROM ${item.datatablename} dv WHERE dv.time = ( SELECT MAX(dv.time) AS time FROM ${item.datatablename} dv ) ) ma
) t

SELECT time_full, categories_time, CAST(SUM(`value`) AS DECIMAL) AS `value` FROM (
SELECT time_format, time_full, categories_time, LEAD(${reading_field}) OVER (ORDER BY time_format) - ${reading_field} AS `value` FROM ( SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%m/%d/%Y %H:00') AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%H:00') AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%m/%d/%Y') AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%d. %b') AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%m/%d/%Y') AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%b. %Y') AS categories_time,
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS time_format, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%m/%d/%Y %H:00') AS time_full, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', #{timezone_value}), '%H:00') AS categories_time,
MIN(dv.time), dv.${reading_field} FROM ${item.datatablename} dv WHERE
dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{end_date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 00:59:59'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC')
dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{end_date}, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01 23:59:59'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC')
dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(#{end_date}, INTERVAL 12 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01 00:00:00'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{end_date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC')
dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(#{commissioning}, #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{end_date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC')
dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(#{end_date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d 00:59:59'), #{timezone_value}, 'UTC')
GROUP BY time_format ) t
) t WHERE
time_format <= DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
time_format <= DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(#{end_date}), '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
time_format <= DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
time_format <= DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
GROUP BY time_format
